---
title: "BC Association Exploratory"
author: "Becky"
date: "2023-05-03"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r }
df <- read_table("multbccount.txt")
summary(df)

df2 <- read_table("singlebccount.txt")

df3 <- rbind(df,df2)
summary(df3)

```



```{r unfiltered mult support only}
ggplot(df, aes(count)) +
  geom_bar() +
  xlab("number of reads supporting a BC-CRE association") +
  ylab("number of BCs") +
  ggtitle("Barcode Association Stats, only BCs with at least 2 supporting reads")
```


```{r unfiltered all}
ggplot(df3, aes(count)) +
  geom_bar() +
  xlab("number of reads supporting a BC-CRE association") +
  ylab("number of BCs") +
  ggtitle("Barcode Association Stats")

```

```{r filter data}
singles <- read_table("barcode_association_single_support.txt")
mults <- read_table("barcode_association_multiple_support.txt")
all_assoc <- rbind(singles, mults)
all_assoc

all_assoc2 <- all_assoc

all_assoc2$size <- all_assoc2$end - all_assoc2$start

summary(all_assoc2$size)

```

```{r}
rangefilt <- all_assoc %>% filter(start >= 43846930) %>% filter(end <= 47035962)

rangefilt$size <- rangefilt$end - rangefilt$start

rangefilt

summary(rangefilt$size)

data <- rangefilt %>% filter(size <= 1000)
data2 <- all_assoc2 %>% filter(size<=1000)

ggplot(data2, aes(size)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1 ) +
  xlab("size of CRS") +
  ylab("number of CRSs") +
  ggtitle("Barcode Association Stats") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900, 1000), minor_breaks =c(50, 150, 250, 350, 450, 550, 650, 750, 850, 950))


ggplot(data, aes(size)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1 ) +
  xlab("size of CRS") +
  ylab("number of CRSs") +
  ggtitle("Barcode Association Stats") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900, 1000), minor_breaks =c(50, 150, 250, 350, 450, 550, 650, 750, 850, 950))

```

```{r filter by size of CRS}
sizefilt <- rangefilt %>% filter(size >= 150) %>% filter(size <= 350)

summary(sizefilt)

#removing any barcodes with n's
sizefilt <- dplyr::filter(sizefilt, !grepl("N", barcode))



filtsingles <- sizefilt %>% filter(count == 1)
filtmults <- sizefilt %>% filter(count != 1)
summary (filtmults)




ggplot(sizefilt,aes(count)) +
  geom_bar() +
  xlab("number of reads supporting a BC-CRE association") +
  ylab("number of BCs") +
  ggtitle("Filtered Barcode Association Stats")

ggplot(filtmults, aes(count)) +
  geom_bar() +
  xlab("number of reads supporting a BC-CRE association") +
  ylab("number of BCs") +
  ggtitle("Filtered Barcode Association Stats")

```

```{r binning}
sizefilt$mean <- rowMeans(sizefilt[, 2:3])
#bins to nearest 100 on start end end range filter
bins = seq(43846900,47036000, by = 100)
bin100 <- sizefilt %>% mutate(bin = cut(mean, breaks = bins))
bin100
bp150 <- seq(43846900,47036000, by = 150)
bin150 <- sizefilt %>% mutate(bin = cut(mean, breaks = bp150))
#bp500 = seq(43846900,47036000, by = 500)
#bin500 <- sizefilt %>% mutate(bin = cut(mean, breaks = bp500))


#ggplot(bin100, aes(bin)) +
 # geom_bar() +
  #xlab("100bp bins") +
  #ylab("number of BCs per bin") +
  #ggtitle("barcode distribution")

#ggplot(bin150, aes(bin)) +
 # geom_bar() +
  #xlab("100bp bins") +
  #ylab("number of BCs per bin") +
  #ggtitle("barcode distribution")

#ggplot(bin500, aes(bin)) +
#  geom_bar() +
#  xlab("500bp bins") +
#  ylab("number of BCs per bin") +
#  ggtitle("barcode distribution")
```

```{r}
#table(bin100$bin)
counts <- as_tibble(table(bin100$bin), .name_repair = unique)
names(counts)[1] <- "bin"
names(counts)[2] <- "count"
summary(counts$count)
table(counts$count)
freqtab <- as_tibble_row(table(counts$count))
freqtab2 <- freqtab %>% pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "bcsperbin", values_to = "numbins")

#ggplot(freqtab2, aes(bcsperbin, numbins)) +
 # geom_smooth() +
 # xlab("BCs/Bin") +
#  ylab("number of bins") +
 # ggtitle("BC/Bin distribution")

```

```{r}
nobcs <- counts %>% filter(count == 0)
nobcs

```

```{r only multiple support}
#commenting out this block, this version the bins aren't sorted correctly

#onlymult <- sizefilt %>% dplyr::filter(count != 1)
#mult100 <- onlymult %>% mutate(bin = cut(mean, breaks = bins))

#ggplot(mult100, aes(bin)) +
 # geom_bar() +
  #xlab("100bp bins") +
  #ylab("number of BCs per bin") +
  #ggtitle("barcode distribution, only mult supports, filtered")

```

```{r}

write.csv(sizefilt, "filtered_bc_assocs_noNs.csv")

```

```{r}
options(scipen=999)
binsend = bins + 100
#format(binsend, scientific=F)
#format(bins, scientific=F)
chr = "chr17"
binstring = toString(bins)
#label = str_c("bin", binstring, sep ="")
label = bins
designbed = tibble(chr, bins, binsend, label)
designbed$label <- sub("^", "bin", designbed$label)
designbed
```


```{r}
write.table(designbed, "100bindesignfile3.bed", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote=FALSE)
```

```{r}
bin100_1 <- bin100 %>% mutate(bin = as.character(bin))
counts <- as_tibble(table(bin100_1$bin), .name_repair = unique)
names(counts)[1] <- "bin"
names(counts)[2] <- "count"
summary(counts$count)
table(counts$count)
freqtab <- as_tibble_row(table(counts$count))
freqtab2 <- freqtab %>% pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "bcsperbin", values_to = "numbins")
counts2 <- counts %>% separate_wider_delim(bin, ",", names=c("bin1", "bin2"))
counts2$bin1 <- gsub("[(]", "", counts2$bin1)
counts3 <- counts2 %>% mutate(bin1 = as.integer(bin1))
counts4 <- counts3 %>% arrange(bin1)

ggplot(counts4, aes(bin1, count)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("BCs/Bin") +
  xlab("bins") +
  ggtitle("BC/Bin distribution")
```

```{r}
maptgap <- bin100 %>% dplyr::filter(mean >= 45770900 ) %>% dplyr::filter(mean <= 46099600) %>% droplevels()
summary(maptgap)
counts2 <- as_tibble(table(maptgap$bin), .name_repair = unique)
names(counts2)[1] <- "bin"
names(counts2)[2] <- "count"
counts3 <- counts2 %>% filter(count != 0)
```

```{r}
counts4nozero <- counts4 %>% dplyr::filter(count != 0)

options(scipen=999)
binstartnew = counts4nozero$bin1
binendnew = binstartnew + 100
#format(binsend, scientific=F)
#format(bins, scientific=F)
chr = "chr17"
binstring = toString(binstartnew)
#label = str_c("bin", binstring, sep ="")
label = binstartnew
designbed = tibble(chr, binstartnew, binendnew, label)
designbed$label <- sub("^", "bin", designbed$label)
designbed

write.table(designbed, "100bindesignfile5.bed", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote=FALSE)
```
